name: GitLab
description: Manage GitLab projects, issues, merge requests, pipelines, and branches via the GitLab REST API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## GitLab REST API

Connect to GitLab to manage projects, issues, merge requests, pipelines, branches, and commits programmatically.

### Features
- Browse and search projects
- Manage issues and merge requests
- View pipelines and their status
- List and create branches
- Track commits and repository history

### Authentication
Requires a GitLab personal access token with appropriate scopes (api, read_api).

Authorization.description: GitLab personal access token as Bearer (Environment variable: GITLAB_TOKEN)

PRIVATE-TOKEN.description: GitLab personal access token as Private-Token header (Environment variable: GITLAB_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get Project
tools.description: Get details about a specific GitLab project by its ID or URL-encoded path.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project (e.g., 'namespace%2Fproject').

response.description: Project details including name, description, visibility, stars, and default branch.

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List GitLab projects accessible to the authenticated user.

search.description: Search term to filter projects by name.

owned.description: If true, return only projects owned by the current user.

membership.description: If true, return only projects the current user is a member of.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of projects with name, description, visibility, and statistics.

tools.name: List Issues
tools.description: List issues for a specific GitLab project.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project.

labels.description: Comma-separated list of label names to filter by.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of issues with title, description, state, labels, and assignee details.

tools.name: Create Issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitLab project.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project.

description.description: The description of the issue (markdown supported).

labels.description: Comma-separated list of label names to assign.

assignee_ids.description: Array of user IDs to assign the issue to.

response.description: The created issue with its IID, URL, and full details.

tools.name: List Merge Requests
tools.description: List merge requests for a specific GitLab project.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of merge requests with title, state, source and target branches.

tools.name: Create Merge Request
tools.description: Create a new merge request in a GitLab project.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project.

title.description: The title of the merge request.

source_branch.description: The source branch name for the merge request.

target_branch.description: The target branch name for the merge request.

description.description: Description of the merge request (markdown supported).

response.description: The created merge request with its IID, URL, and full details.

tools.name: Get User
tools.description: Get a GitLab user's profile by their user ID.

id.description: The numeric ID of the GitLab user.

response.description: User profile with username, name, email, avatar, and account details.

tools.name: List Commits
tools.description: List commits in a GitLab project repository.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project.

ref_name.description: The name of a branch, tag, or commit to list commits from.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of commits with SHA, author, message, and timestamp.

tools.name: List Branches
tools.description: List branches in a GitLab project repository.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project.

response.description: List of branches with name, commit SHA, and protection status.

tools.name: Create Branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in a GitLab project repository.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project.

branch.description: The name of the new branch.

ref.description: The branch name, tag, or commit SHA to create the branch from.

response.description: The created branch with its name, commit details, and protection status.

tools.name: List Pipelines
tools.description: List CI/CD pipelines for a GitLab project.

id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of pipelines with ID, status, ref, SHA, and timestamps.
